reviews.review_description: I would like to say that this game is very good, but I’m going to announce some of my few concerns first there’s not that many missions so I wish there was more to this game. Second of all I want to be able to manually reload. Also I’m not a fan of snap turn and I would rather have a smooth turn option. If you can add these updates into this game I will greatly appreciate it ￼

Game would have gotten more stars if there was more missions or a online vrs mode of Nintendo could do duck hunting in theb90s we can come up with a little more in 2025 other then the lack of missions the game is amazing so good it angers me there is not more

Its a beautiful designed game love concept but I desperately needs some love from the developers because of the glitches for example i go to the shooting range i fall through the map  if these glitches could be fixed id increase my review score
Oh yea Great game,Love it,BUT🍑 Plz add recoil it just make the game more realistic but Great game in the end
Cant reload and it's stuck on left hand mode
I would never recommend  this sħįty game to anyone

DO NOT BUY THIS IF YOU WANT AN OPEN WORLD HUNTING GAME.

  All you do is sit in a box and wait like 20mins for the animals to come to you.

I only have two complaints. You don’t walk around in the game, you just sit in a wooden box and shoot animals. 
My second complaint is very personal, but made me not want to touch the game: the dog acts very weird when it’s close to the player. I called him towards me to pet him, so he would obey me better. The when I stopped petting him, he looked directly at me with his mouth open and started growling….. I thought there was something behind me but it was just the lake that I was shooting on, in the first mission.  The he walked away and I couldn’t see him, I looked to the right side of you face away from the lake, and normally the dog goes there, but I didn’t see him. I looked over the side of the box and then he popped out and started walking towards me with his mouth open. This turned me away from the game completely, and I probably won’t play it anymore unless they make it possible to disable the dog. He’s cute but he acts extremely wierd.
